name: @sheygoodbai/openclaw-readable-output
description: OpenClaw plugin that adds a local readability layer to long AI replies, surfacing overview, key points, warnings, next steps, and folded original text for verification.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check docs/demo/app.js && node --check browser-companion/openclaw-tool-overlay/extension-state.js && node --check browser-companion/openclaw-tool-overlay/content.js && node --check browser-companion/openclaw-tool-overlay/background.js && node --check browser-companion/openclaw-tool-overlay/popup.js && node --check browser-companion/openclaw-tool-overlay/options.js && node scripts/sync-demo-core.mjs --check && node scripts/sync-browser-engine.mjs --check && node --test tests/*.test.js
